text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title "Efficient evolution of human antibodies from general protein language models," published in Nature Biotechnology, and is confirmed on Nature.com, PubMed, PMC, and Semantic Scholar. The cited authors (Hie, Shanker, Xu, Bruun, Weidenbacher, Tang, Wu, Pak, Kim) match the real paper, with the only discrepancy being that John Kuriyan is listed in the reference but does not appear among the actual authors — this is a minor error in one author name, not a wholesale fabrication.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41587-023-01763-2
